meaning: adj.不怕的,大胆的,勇敢的,无畏的
examples: Fearlessness stems from selflessness.; Only the selfless can be fearless.
The fearless rodent proved he was no scaredy-cat as he astonishingly squared up to his large opponent and refused to budge.
This movie describes a brave hero who is fearless to fight against all Gods... Children, come and see it!
We are prone to view ourselves as fearless explorers in the New Digital World.
Rae's second effort marks the arrival of a newly observant songwriter and an absolutely fearless singer.
